title: Proxy issue: proxyconnect tcp: dial tcp: lookup my-proxy.com: Temporary failure in name resolution
body:
/kind bug

Proxy trouble when working through the Windows setup guide.  I initially thought it was related to corporate firewall but I get the same whether I'm on the VPN or not: 

`> podman run ubi8-micro date
Resolved "ubi8-micro" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest...
Error: initializing source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest: pinging container registry registry.access.redhat.com: Get "https://registry.access.redhat.com/v2/": proxyconnect tcp: dial tcp: lookup my-corp-proxy.com: Temporary failure in name resolution`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
This is the 'First Podman Command' step here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/tutorials/podman-for-windows.md

I'm running the cmd in Windows Terminal / Powershell whilst on and off the VPN, same result 

**Output of `podman version`:**


comments.body:
Hi, 
I have the same issue.  I assume corporate policy make restriction on podman or name resolution...
Steps:
1 Having` podman machine init` was success. 
2 but  `podman run ubi8-micro date` failed with `Resolved "ubi8-micro" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest...
Error: initializing source docker://registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-micro:latest: pinging container registry registry.access.redhat.com: Get "https://registry.access.redhat.com/v2/": dial tcp: lookup registry.access.redhat.com: Temporary failure in name resolution`

if i check how name resolution works in podman vm with `wsl -d podman-machine-default` with curl `curl google.com
curl: (6) Could not resolve host: google.com` then it shows no name resolution works in this vm.
I fixed this by upgrading the OS.  I believe the docs state 20.10 as a minimum.  I moved to 22.10 and 'apt install podman' is working and podman cmds also

Hi, 
Thanks for opening the ticket and more over to give hint how to workaround!
please give me some guidance how to upgrade the OS? Im just begginer on podman yet. :) so i appreciate any link / guide. thx in advance.
